# Kursfind AI - AI Crawler Information
# https://kursfind.de

## About
Kursfind AI is an AI-powered platform for finding AZAV-certified vocational training courses in Germany.
We help job seekers find courses eligible for Bildungsgutschein (education voucher) from the Arbeitsagentur.

## What We Offer
- AI-powered course search and recommendations
- AZAV-certified vocational training courses
- Courses eligible for Bildungsgutschein and AVGS funding
- Connection between learners and education providers

## Target Audience
- Job seekers in Germany looking for vocational training
- People with Bildungsgutschein from Arbeitsagentur/Jobcenter
- Career changers seeking Umschulung (retraining)
- Education providers offering AZAV-certified courses

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://kursfind.de
- Course Search: https://kursfind.de/suchen
- For Providers: https://kursfind.de/anbieter
- About: https://kursfind.de/ueber-uns

## Contact
Email: kontakt@kursfind.de
Partner inquiries: partner@kursfind.de

## Crawling Policy
AI crawlers are welcome to index our public content.
Please respect robots.txt directives.
